evidence: AEP invested $100 million for a 10% ownership interest in the common stock and received a warrant for the option to acquire an additional 5% of GWAI s common stock for $50 million.
Contingent upon GWAI s achievement of defined performance-based milestones, AEP will invest up to an additional $100 million for up to an additional 10% of GWAI s common stock.
In January 2026, AEP made an additional $25 million investment for an incremental 2.5% interest in GWAI s common stock
GWAI is focused on developing AI-centric operating systems and applications that optimize utility operations and infrastructure.

In the fourth quarter of 2025...evaluation of AEP s strategy and expectations for ongoing advancements in available technologies, including the expanded use of, and potential capabilities for, AI-centric software and other agile software functionality
Gigawatt AI Inc., an equity interest joint venture formed to build the AI-centric operating system for utilities.
Information technology failure, including failure of AI technology, that impairs AEP s information technology infrastructure or disrupts normal business operations.
The rapid evolution and increased adoption of AI technologies may intensify AEP s cybersecurity risks.

Advancements in artificial intelligence and other emerging technologies may require significant changes to the size, skills, and composition of AEP s workforce...adversely affect AEP s operations and financial performance.

limitations: ai_narrative_concreteness scored 4 rather than 5: named deployed use cases described (AI-centric OS for utility operations, internal software strategy pivot) but no quantified business results such as cost savings, efficiency percentages, or volume metrics are disclosed in the excerpts.

The $66 million internal-use software impairment charge relates to an abandoned legacy system replacement partly driven by AI strategy shift, but is not a direct AI capex commitment and was excluded from capex_mentions.
Excerpts do not include the full risk factors section; however, multiple [risk_factors]-labeled excerpts are present and were scored accordingly.

Multi-year commitment to Gigawatt AI is partially contingent on performance milestones, introducing uncertainty about whether total disclosed amounts will be deployed; scored 4 rather than 5 as the full program commitment is conditional rather than firm.
